scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build && rm -rf ../backend/dist ../dist && cp -r dist ../backend/ && cp -r dist ../ && cd ../backend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx prisma@5 generate
scripts.start: bash -c 'cd backend && (npx prisma@5 db push || true) && (node prisma/seed.js || true) && node src/index.js'
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
